collection_progression.output_name: Virtual Villagers - New Believers - Modified Max Pop.exe

patches.purpose: route the cap comparison through a true 135-base calculation that counts every occupied or reserved villager slot
add base 135 with a 32-bit immediate, preserve the 0-15 collection bonus, compare total slot demand, and resume the stock housing gates

immediate_fixed.output_name: Virtual Villagers - New Believers - Fixed Max Pop.exe

patches.purpose: replace every collection-bonus result with fixed arithmetic for a 150 maximum
route the fixed cap comparison through the total occupied-or-reserved slot counter
complete the fixed 150 calculation, compare total slot demand, and resume the stock housing gates

patches.purpose: replace every collection-bonus result with fixed arithmetic for a 256 maximum
route the fixed cap comparison through the total occupied-or-reserved slot counter
add the stock 90 housing component to fixed 166, compare 256 total occupied-or-reserved slots, and resume the stock housing gates

safety_patches.purpose: route triplet selection through the 150-slot saturation guard
keep triplets only when three physical villager slots remain after active Heathens, corpses, and nursing babies are counted
route twin selection through the 150-slot saturation guard
keep twins only when two physical villager slots remain after active Heathens, corpses, and nursing babies are counted
count all active VV5 villager records plus nursing babies that still require future records, independent of believer or Heathen faction
recheck all occupied and reserved slots before Barrel O' Babies creates its first believer child
skip the first believer child at 150 physical slots and otherwise resume the stock event
recheck all occupied and reserved slots before Barrel O' Heathen Babies creates its first Heathen child
skip the first Heathen child at 150 physical slots and otherwise resume the stock event
recheck all occupied and reserved slots before Chutes Without Ladders creates its first child
skip the first Chutes child at 150 physical slots and otherwise resume the stock event
route Abandoned Infants through a remaining-slot clamp
reserve no more than the lesser of six abandoned infants or VV5's remaining occupied-or-reserved physical slots

patch_modes.name: Collection Progression Max Pop
patch_modes.description: Collections keep raising the cap; all population bonuses are needed to reach the absolute slot maximum.

patch_modes.name: Immediate Fixed Max Pop
patch_modes.description: The absolute slot maximum is available immediately; collection bonuses no longer affect it.

patch_modes.name: Experimental Expanded 256 Villagers
patch_modes.description: VV3-VV5 expand their physical villager record and save capacity from 150 to 256; VV1-VV2 use their existing 256 slots. The 256 maximum is immediate and collections no longer alter it.

fun_patches.name: Easier Healing Mastery
fun_patches.description: Healers and villagers who prefer Healing study plants when no sick villager needs treatment, including during catch-up.

patches.purpose: route the no-sick-target healing result into the existing persistent plant-study state
set plant-study state 9 and reuse the stock live and catch-up work dispatcher

fun_patches.name: Teaching Children Grants Skill
fun_patches.description: Each child attending a Teaching Children lesson gains one point in one equally random skill: Farming, Building, Research, Healing, or Parenting.

patches.purpose: route each confirmed lesson attendee through the one-time random skill award
award one capped point across the five contiguous skill fields with equal odds, then resume the stock lesson queue

fun_patches.name: School Lessons Grant Skill
fun_patches.description: Each villager entering the unlocked Going to school activity gains one point in one equally random skill: Farming, Building, Research, Healing, or Parenting.

patches.purpose: route the unlocked Going to school branch through the one-time random skill award
award one capped point across the five VV1 skill fields, restore all displaced pushes, and resume the stock school queue

fun_patches.name: Continue Research at Max Technologies
fun_patches.description: Researchers keep choosing the stock research action and earning tech points after all six technologies reach level 3.

patches.purpose: keep the stock research action eligible when the six technology levels sum to the legitimate maximum of 18

fun_patches.name: Reenable F6 Clothing Change Cheat
fun_patches.description: Pressing F6 cycles the selected active villager to the next stock outfit and wraps from outfit 19 back to outfit 0.

patches.purpose: route the retained internal F6 event through a guarded gameplay-key branch
detour the shared gameplay-key branch so F6 can be distinguished from its original key
increment the selected active villager's stock clothing index, wrap 19 to 0, and preserve the original non-F6 key behavior

fun_patches.name: Nature Level 1 Improves Honey Refill
fun_patches.description: Nature level 1 or higher gives the honey resource the same proportional refill-rate improvement that it gives the fruit trees.

patches.purpose: route honey refill arithmetic through a guarded Nature-technology multiplier
preserve the stock honey rate at Nature 0 and apply the fruit trees' exact 42-to-37 proportional improvement at Nature level 1 or higher

fun_patches.name: Complete Fish Scales = Golden Fish in Nets
fun_patches.description: Golden Fish become eligible in the fishing nets only after all 12 Fish Scales are collected. This changes the stock partial-collection threshold while preserving the completed collection's original 25% Golden Fish chance and every other fishing outcome.

patches.purpose: require all 12 Fish Scales instead of only one before the stock Golden Fish branch can run

fun_patches.name: Heathen Mommy Puzzle Restoration
fun_patches.description: Restores the natural Heathen Mommy to newly created villages as a tag-17 Heathen mother with one nursing baby, using two physical slots, and restores the hidden 17th Heathen Parent graphic to the Puzzles screen. Existing saves are not retroactively given a new mother.

patches.purpose: route the end of the standard 16-puzzle drawing loop through the retained bonus-puzzle renderer
draw the stock locked or solved bonus graphic from puzzle 17 state, then resume the original Puzzles screen
route the end of new-game Heathen creation through the natural-build Heathen Mommy and baby sequence
create and initialize the exact tag-17 Heathen mother, assign her one forced nursing baby using the retained Unknown label, then resume final stock villager-manager initialization

fun_patches.name: Easier Devotee Training
fun_patches.description: Villagers with Devotion skill can spontaneously use the stock Honoring action instead of that autonomous opportunity being confined to the Retired Chief.

patches.purpose: route autonomous eligibility through a guarded Retired Chief-or-positive-Devotion predicate
route the stock Honoring-or-Spreading choice through a Retired Chief discriminator
preserve Retired Chief eligibility while also allowing villagers whose actual Devotion skill is positive
preserve the Retired Chief's stock random Honoring-or-Spreading choice while sending all newly eligible devotees only to Honoring

fun_patches.name: Statue Drops: Polishing or Honoring
fun_patches.description: Dropping a villager on the upgradeable or completed statue chooses with equal odds between the stock Polishing the Statue and Honoring activities.

patches.purpose: route the first manual statue-drop Honoring dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the second upgradeable-statue Honoring dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the first completed-statue Polishing dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the second completed-statue Polishing dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
choose stock behavior 0x9D Polishing or 0xA0 Honoring with equal odds while preserving the original call stack

fun_patches.name: VV4 Nursery School Divisor Parity
fun_patches.description: For parity with Virtual Villagers 4, changes VV5's six-skill spread lesson divisor from five to six. VV5 normally distributes one-fifth of a lesson to each of six skills, an arithmetic inconsistency that awards six-fifths in total; this patch distributes exactly one-sixth to each skill without claiming whether the original inconsistency was intentional.

patches.purpose: redirect only the Nursery School spread division from the shared 5.0 constant to a private 6.0 constant
store the private IEEE-754 double constant 6.0 used only by the Nursery School parity patch
